desc: The first book of A Starless Clan: RiverClan's medicine-cat apprentice Frostpaw faces a crisis as her Clan loses its connection to StarClan.
descZh: 《无星之族》系列第一部：河族（RiverClan）的巫医学徒霜爪（Frostpaw）在族群与星族（StarClan）失去联系时直面危机。

q.en: Which three young cats are the main point-of-view characters in River?
q.zh: 《河浪》中，哪三只年轻猫是本书的主要视角角色？

options.en: Flamepaw, Frostpaw, and Sunbeam
Bramblestar, Squirrelflight, and Leafstar
Rootspring, Bristlefrost, and Shadowsight
Mistystar, Curlfeather, and Mothwing

explain.en: River follows three apprentices/new warriors: Flamepaw of ThunderClan, Frostpaw of RiverClan, and Sunbeam of ShadowClan.
explain.zh: 《河浪》以三只年轻猫为视角：雷族（ThunderClan）的焰爪、河族的霜爪和影族（ShadowClan）的桑比姆。

q.en: What role does Frostpaw have in RiverClan?
q.zh: 霜爪（Frostpaw）在河族担任什么角色？

options.en: The Clan leader
A medicine-cat apprentice
The deputy
A kittypet from the Twolegplace
options.zh: 来自两脚兽地盘的宠物猫

explain.en: Frostpaw is RiverClan's medicine-cat apprentice, training under Mothwing, and is the only cat who can still hear StarClan.
explain.zh: 霜爪是河族的巫医学徒，在蛾翅（Mothwing）门下学习，也是当时唯一还能听见星族声音的猫。

options.en: Mistystar and Reedwhisker
Curlfeather and Jayclaw
Mothwing and Blackclaw
Leafstar and Billystorm

explain.en: Frostpaw is the daughter of Curlfeather and Jayclaw, and Curlfeather believes her kit has a great destiny.
explain.zh: 霜爪是卷羽（Curlfeather）和杰爪（Jayclaw）的女儿，卷羽坚信自己的女儿肩负着重大命运。

q.en: What happens to Mistystar, RiverClan's very old leader, during River?
q.zh: 河族年迈的族长雾星（Mistystar），在《河浪》中发生了什么？

options.en: She mates with a SkyClan cat
options.zh: 她与一只天族（SkyClan）的猫结为伴侣

options.en: She leads a battle against ShadowClan
options.zh: 她率领河族与影族开战

options.en: She collapses and loses her final life
options.zh: 她激动倒下，失去了最后一条命

options.en: She is made deputy of RiverClan
options.zh: 她被任命为河族副族长

explain.en: After RiverClan cats confront her about the new code changes, Mistystar becomes agitated, collapses, and loses her last life.
explain.zh: 河族猫就守则改动与雾星对峙，她激动之下倒地，失去了最后一条命。

q.en: What new change to the warrior code is announced at the Gathering in River?
q.zh: 在《河浪》的族长大会上，宣布了对战士守则的哪一项新改动？

options.en: Kits must begin training at birth
options.zh: 幼崽一出生就必须开始训练

options.en: Cats may switch Clans to be with a mate
options.zh: 猫可以为了和伴侣在一起而更换族群

options.en: Medicine cats can no longer speak to StarClan
options.zh: 巫医从此不能再与星族交谈

options.en: Leaders now serve only a single life

explain.en: The leaders agree cats may leave their Clan to join a mate, after announcing it at a Gathering and passing a test.
explain.zh: 族长们同意：猫可以在族长大会上宣布后，通过一项考验，便为了伴侣离开本族加入对方族群。

q.en: Why does Flamepaw fail his warrior assessment in ThunderClan?
q.zh: 焰爪（Flamepaw）在雷族的战士考核中为何失败？

options.en: He is too afraid to leave camp
options.zh: 他害怕得不敢离开营地

options.en: He catches no prey at all
He tries a risky show-off move and catches only one mouse
options.zh: 他卖弄高难度动作，结果只抓到一只老鼠

options.en: He arrives late to the assessment

explain.en: Trying to impress his mentor with a flashy leap, Flamepaw botches the move and returns with just a single mouse.
explain.zh: 焰爪想用花哨的跳跃给导师露脸，结果动作失败，只带回一只老鼠，考核告吹。

q.en: Whose famous kin is Flamepaw descended from?
q.zh: 焰爪（Flamepaw）是哪位传奇猫的后代？

options.en: Tigerstar
Firestar
Bluestar
Crookedstar

explain.en: Flamepaw is a descendant of Firestar, the legendary ThunderClan leader, and feels pressured to live up to that name.
explain.zh: 焰爪是雷族传奇族长火星（Firestar）的后代，常感到要配得上这个名字的压力。

q.en: What is Reedwhisker's position, and what happens to him after Mistystar dies?
q.zh: 苇须（Reedwhisker）在河族是什么职位？雾星死后他又怎样了？

options.en: He is the medicine cat
He is the leader who loses his lives
He is the deputy who goes missing on patrol
options.zh: 他是副族长，随巡逻队外出后失踪

options.en: He is a kittypet who joins RiverClan
options.zh: 他是加入河族的宠物猫

explain.en: Reedwhisker is RiverClan's deputy; after Mistystar's death his patrol returns without him, and he is feared lost.
explain.zh: 苇须是河族的副族长；雾星死后，他的巡逻队回来时却没有他，大家担心他已失踪。

q.en: What is unusual about Mothwing as RiverClan's medicine cat?
q.zh: 河族巫医蛾翅（Mothwing）有什么特别之处？

options.en: She is the oldest cat in the five Clans
options.zh: 她是五大族中最年长的猫

options.en: She has never had a connection to StarClan
options.zh: 她从未与星族（祖先魂灵）有过联系

options.en: She used to be a kittypet
She is also the Clan's deputy

explain.en: Mothwing is committed to her Clan but has never been able to speak with their spirit ancestors, so Frostpaw restores that link.
explain.zh: 蛾翅忠心耿耿，却从未能与祖先的魂灵沟通，因此霜爪的降生让河族重新看到了与星族联络的希望。

q.en: What major danger hangs over the Clans at the start of A Starless Clan?
q.zh: 在《无星之族》开篇，笼罩各族群的最大危机是什么？

options.en: A flood destroys all the lake territories
options.zh: 洪水摧毁了湖区所有领地

options.en: StarClan has gone silent, leaving the Clans without guidance
options.zh: 星族（StarClan）陷入沉默，各族群失去指引

options.en: Two Clans merge into one
options.zh: 两个族群合并成了一个

options.en: The warrior code is completely abolished

explain.en: The Clans fear they are becoming a 'starless clan' because their ancestors in StarClan no longer speak to them.
explain.zh: 各族群担心自己正在变成「无星之族」——因为星族中的祖先不再对他们说话了。
